description: The research analytics team needs custom dimension tracking configured for the 'Research Platform' website to enable advanced audience segmentation and behavioral analysis. Configure five active custom dimensions for the site. Create three Visit-scope dimensions named 'Subscription Tier', 'User Cohort', and 'Traffic Source Detail'. Create two Action-scope dimensions named 'Page Category' and 'Form Interaction'. Ensure all five custom dimensions are set to active status. Login credentials: admin / Admin12345
